panels.description: One row per request ID (latest log line by event time → service order → log_seq). Click any cell to load full HTTP logs and the SQL timeline below.

targets.query: ((service:"exercises-java" OR service:"exercises-rust" OR service:"exercises-python" OR service:"exercises-react-node") AND (_exists_:path OR _exists_:fields.path OR _exists_:controller OR _exists_:request_id OR _exists_:fields.request_id OR _exists_:status OR _exists_:fields.status) AND NOT (path:"/health" OR path:"/api/health" OR path:"/metrics" OR path:"/actuator/prometheus" OR path:"/api/observability/health" OR fields.path:"/health" OR fields.path:"/api/health" OR fields.path:"/metrics" OR fields.path:"/actuator/prometheus" OR fields.path:"/api/observability/health" OR controller:health OR fields.controller:health OR ((path:"/" OR fields.path:"/") AND (method:GET OR fields.method:GET)))) OR (service:"exercises-postgres" AND (message:*execute* OR message:statement*) AND NOT message:duration* AND NOT message:*set_config* AND NOT message:*SELECT 1* AND NOT message:*connection* AND NOT message:*disconnection*)

panels.title: Request & SQL logs
Request detail — click a row above or paste Request ID

panels.description: Incoming HTTP request for the selected ID: service, request_id, phase, method, path, parameters, body, message, level, detail, and request headers. Legacy POST payloads in name are coalesced into body.

targets.query: (service:"exercises-java" OR service:"exercises-rust" OR service:"exercises-python" OR service:"exercises-react-node") AND (_exists_:path OR _exists_:fields.path OR _exists_:controller OR _exists_:request_id OR _exists_:fields.request_id OR _exists_:status OR _exists_:fields.status) AND NOT (path:"/health" OR path:"/api/health" OR path:"/metrics" OR path:"/actuator/prometheus" OR path:"/api/observability/health" OR fields.path:"/health" OR fields.path:"/api/health" OR fields.path:"/metrics" OR fields.path:"/actuator/prometheus" OR fields.path:"/api/observability/health" OR controller:health OR fields.controller:health OR ((path:"/" OR fields.path:"/") AND (method:GET OR fields.method:GET)))

panels.title: Incoming HTTP request — ${correlation_id}

panels.description: HTTP request field values per log line: event_time, service, request_id, phase, method, path, parameters, body, message, level, detail, and request headers.

targets.query: ((service:"exercises-java" OR service:"exercises-rust" OR service:"exercises-python" OR service:"exercises-react-node") AND phase:received) OR (service:"exercises-postgres" AND _exists_:detail)

panels.title: HTTP request fields

panels.description: Every HTTP line for the selected request: automatic request received (before controller), controller handler lines, and access completed. Select a row in the table above first.

targets.query: (service:"exercises-java" OR service:"exercises-rust" OR service:"exercises-python" OR service:"exercises-react-node") AND (_exists_:path OR _exists_:fields.path OR _exists_:controller OR _exists_:request_id OR _exists_:fields.request_id OR _exists_:status OR _exists_:fields.status) AND NOT (path:"/health" OR path:"/api/health" OR path:"/metrics" OR path:"/actuator/prometheus" OR path:"/api/observability/health" OR fields.path:"/health" OR fields.path:"/api/health" OR fields.path:"/metrics" OR fields.path:"/actuator/prometheus" OR fields.path:"/api/observability/health" OR controller:health OR fields.controller:health OR ((path:"/" OR fields.path:"/") AND (method:GET OR fields.method:GET)))

panels.title: HTTP request log — ${correlation_id}

panels.description: HTTP + Postgres timeline for the selected request. Sorted by event time; when timestamps tie, Java→Rust→Postgres; log_seq only orders lines within the same service.

targets.query: ((service:"exercises-java" OR service:"exercises-rust" OR service:"exercises-python" OR service:"exercises-react-node") AND (_exists_:path OR _exists_:fields.path OR _exists_:controller OR _exists_:request_id OR _exists_:fields.request_id OR _exists_:status OR _exists_:fields.status) AND NOT (path:"/health" OR path:"/api/health" OR path:"/metrics" OR path:"/actuator/prometheus" OR path:"/api/observability/health" OR fields.path:"/health" OR fields.path:"/api/health" OR fields.path:"/metrics" OR fields.path:"/api/observability/health" OR controller:health OR fields.controller:health OR ((path:"/" OR fields.path:"/") AND (method:GET OR fields.method:GET)))) OR (service:"exercises-postgres" AND (message:*execute* OR message:statement*) AND NOT message:duration* AND NOT message:*set_config* AND NOT message:*SELECT 1* AND NOT message:*connection* AND NOT message:*disconnection*)

panels.title: SQL & request timeline — ${correlation_id}

list.description: Click a grouped row above, or paste an X-Request-ID. Clear selection resets the panels below.
list.label: Selected request ID
